skills.name: audette-create-asset
skills.description: Creates a new asset record in the Soapbox platform

skills.name: audette-create-building
skills.description: Creates a new building in the Audette platform by extracting property details from documents

skills.name: audette-energy-data
skills.description: Extracts utility bill data from PDFs/Excel files and submits to Audette

skills.name: audette-equipment-survey
skills.description: Extracts building equipment data from documents and submits a structured equipment survey to Audette

skills.name: audette-onboarding
skills.description: Full Audette onboarding workflow for a Soapbox asset with no Audette building yet — creates buildings from footprints, links property, patches asset, submits utility or equipment data

skills.name: audette-setup
skills.description: Interactive setup and demonstration that tests all Audette Orchestrator functionality

skills.name: egc-compliance
skills.description: Analyzes building compliance with emissions and energy regulations

skills.name: egc-compliance-v2
skills.description: Analyzes building compliance with emissions and energy regulations (v2)

skills.name: equipment-estimator
skills.description: Estimates building equipment details from property type, vintage, and climate zone

skills.name: equipment-gap-questionnaire
skills.description: Generates a targeted questionnaire for missing equipment fields

skills.name: file-index
skills.description: Indexes project documents to a .file-index.md for fast lookup

skills.name: kml-generator
skills.description: Generates KML files from building footprint or geospatial data

skills.name: osm-gfa-calculator
skills.description: Calculates gross floor area per building using OpenStreetMap footprint data

skills.name: pdf-extract
skills.description: Extracts structured data from PDF documents

skills.name: report
skills.description: Generates a full Audette decarbonization report for a building

skills.name: report-template-generator
skills.description: Generates report templates for Audette decarbonization reports

skills.name: system-details
skills.description: Displays system and environment details for debugging

skills.name: update-memory
skills.description: Updates persistent memory with new learnings from the current session

skills.name: workspace-rag
skills.description: Runs retrieval-augmented generation queries over the workspace document index

skills.name: workspace-setup
skills.description: Sets up a new Audette workspace folder with config and document structure
